Tolan's Darkwood Helm  
 

Lore Item
Slot: HEAD
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 18
Effect: Superior Camouflage (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 45
WT: 6.0 Size: SMALL
Class: RNG
Race: ALL except IKS VAH FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Lore Item
Slot: HEAD
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 18

Source:Live

Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 600pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 53

Post Comment
Invis for other races?
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2004 at 8:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591795360322
10 posts
Anyone know if you can use this helm for a Pally?
It doesnt say must be equiped so can i just put it in an inv slot and right click it?
▲ Page top
RE: Invis for other races?
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2004 at 10:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1613953023551
99 posts
All Kunark armor is "Must Equip" armor. So the answer to your question is No.
▲ Page top
Cheap sale
QuoteReply
# Aug 04 2002 at 9:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252776164
View User Forum
9 posts
This Helm has been priced at 1000 to 1200pp in my server. Today, i got lucky, saw one selling for 100pp, and i grab it. Wonder if the trader missed out a zero while pricing it. Anyway, it's really a deal.
▲ Page top
650 only! )
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2002 at 11:12 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591774595691
View User Forum
114 posts
damn i luv the bazaar now. The ppl who try t oundercut ppls pireces make it better for us buyers. Got these for 650pp and looks good. I am only lvl 44 tho! ( but with 1 lvl to go for unlimited, unfizzling superior camo its worth it. Also the AC 18 is nice too for the moment. Altho can u use it to cast on others? i cant wait for the rest of the armour. it'll rock
▲ Page top
pricing
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2002 at 1:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758360076
Scholar
30 posts
I am glad the pricing is coming down on Tolan's stuff. So far, I've picked up the Tolan's Helm, guantlets, and vambraces for 1500pp, a Rallic pack, and a perfect owlbear pelt. Also, I'm borrowing a Tolan's bracer.

As far as value, the effects are worth the mana, fizzle free, and spell slots they free up--Superior Camo, Snare, Stinging Swarm. The bracers summon 20 arrows at a time (no rent). Ok, so I look like I have a sack over my head (haven't looked at the Luclin model yet), and people call me "The Rocketeer", but I'm happy.

Sirul Skypilot
47th Karana Ranger of Surefall
▲ Page top
WTB!
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2002 at 7:39 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591776161318
12 posts
Looking to buy or trade for one of these. Send a tell if you have one for sale.
▲ Page top
Nice Helm
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2002 at 7:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361322235
55 posts
Picked one of these up for 500pp, nice item, considering I can't cast camouflage inside, and we don't get superior camo until 49(am 45 at the moment). Graphics can be a little funny though, I guess, unless you have a matching BP, which is the same browny colour, otherwise this helm does stand out quite a bit :)
▲ Page top
Guess im a lucky ranger
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2002 at 10:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775248679
33 posts
Im a lvl 33 ranger and ive heard of this tolans, i saw a guy selling the helm and i offerd 1k and got it. The AC is more than my bp or legs, the effect dont work but hey for 1k i still believe its worth that. I look kinda stupid all green and then big brown helm lol.

Windsore Longhorn Torv
▲ Page top
Invis Indoors?....awesome
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2001 at 11:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771758308
View User Forum
Sage
74 posts
I just got this badboy atop my skull and there's not much that can match mana free invis other than being able to cast indoors. I gave 2k for mine and feel that it's a very good investment since I can travel alone to some places that I couldn't before without having to have a caster along to cast invis on me. That fact alone make's the price well worth it because I tend to be a loner at times and wanna see the world. Admittedly the cast time is quite long but hey, No mana involved. Get these! Get them today.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 04 2001 at 12:57 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) well just wait another 3 lvs and the helm becomes useless as far as effect altho nice not to worrry abt fizzling and meming it in also the ac is nice..... if nayone is seeling them on the rathe send me a tell (tagian)
RE: Invis Indoors?....awesome
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2002 at 10:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775248679
33 posts
It doesnt become useless it still saves mana and a spell slot.

QuoteReply
# Nov 15 2001 at 9:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769823255
View User Forum
31 posts
Looks different on different races. I'm a half elf, so I got the bucket look instead of the one in the picture above. Sounds like you're talking about the same look.

On an unrelated note, can the superior camo be cast on others, or self only?
▲ Page top
RE: Graphics
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2001 at 3:02 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591773133128
4 posts
You can cast it on others.
▲ Page top
Got mine yesterday
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2001 at 2:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758373017
44 posts
Yesterday, on Luclin server, i was quite lucky, just zoned in to FV from DL and saw auction WTS Tolan helm, then i replied and price? and fellow ranger halfelf told me "1500pp" , so made a deal. Its nice looking and good ac helm, good improvement for my Kylong warhelm [which i had been wearing for 25 lvls;]

Im 46 and it procs superior camo so probably proc lvl is 46 as its usual with all kunark ar and weaps.

Hope this will help

QuoteReply
# Dec 09 2000 at 11:51 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591750540037
2 posts
im a level 40 ranger who recently traded an fbss for this helm and 4k, i know this was a good trade but what i want to know is what level it procs? can anyone enlighten me?

-Poesidon
▲ Page top
RE: proc?
QuoteReply
# Apr 12 2001 at 12:32 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245673499
47 posts
Assuming all these types of armor work the same, you should be able to right click to activate the effect at 45th lvl. I know it worked on my ES Gauntlets at 45th...

Just to confirm, my ranger hit 45th this weekend and all his Tolan pieces are now activatable.
▲ Page top
RE: proc?
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2000 at 12:51 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous

It's a rt clickable effect that works at lvl 46.

Hmmmm...
QuoteReply
# Jan 26 2001 at 9:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751440425
9 posts
I heard/read somewhere it was level 45.

Bought this last night for 6kpp. Cleaned out the bank to do it, but to have SCamo before 49 PLUS the AC is nice... heheh

I don't mind looking funny with a bucket on in dungeons. I'll just keep my Froggy Crown for social functions. ;)
▲ Page top
Prices
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2002 at 2:52 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592247010486
Scholar
360 posts
Just an aside. This is a pretty funny indication of how the EQ economy crashed on (most) old items. This chap spent 6kpp about 111 months ago. Now, at least on EMarr, the price is a rock-solid 1kpp every day in EC. S

Supply and demand, I guess lots of people have Thurg or better now.
